data:
Hi, I’m Silvie Senauke. I like to make weird little things, like this blog. Check out the Craft Museum to see some of the other things I’ve made.
I live in Chicago with my husband and son. This site is part of my personal maternity leave agenda — a way to feel connected to creating and my own identity while caring for a tiny helpless being!
I’m taking inspiration from a couple of sites I enjoy most:
kottke.org — short posts, a window into the strange interesting random parts of the world Cup of Jo — style, highlights of objects she loves, parenting The Strategist — things I might want to buy, product reviews Reach out to me at hello@silvier.org with your comments or questions! +++
